task_name: Pokémon Gen 3 Style HTML5 Web Battle (Two Phases)

subtask1.query: Please read workspace/query.md for detailed two-phase task instructions (Phase 1 prototype, Phase 2 optimization and refactoring). Save all deliverable files in the current working directory when finished.
deliverables: game.html - Single-file HTML/CSS/JS containing the full flow: map exploration → transition → battle
(Optional) assets/ - For custom placeholder assets if needed, but prefer dynamic loading via PokeAPI

rubric.notes: Scoring checks Gen3 mechanics (Physical/Special split, damage formula, critical hit 2x, STAB 1.5, type effectiveness), external Sprite loading (Front/Back), UI fidelity (dialog box, HP bar, menus), transition effects and text typewriter effect, animations and input locking, etc.
